news.headline: Top legislative body to discuss Hong Kong’s shared control over upgraded crossing
news.summary:
China’s top legislative body will discuss a bill next week to authorise Hong Kong’s jurisdiction over part of the redeveloped Huanggang Port in Shenzhen that will adopt a “co-location” arrangement when it opens next month.

news.headline: China showcases anti-drone air defences at Paris show as conflict fuels demand
news.summary:
China’s largest ground-based arms manufacturer is displaying air defence systems specifically for drone warfare, along with advanced artillery equipment at this year’s Eurosatory exhibition in France.

news.headline: Eldest son of Norway’s crown princess sentenced to 4 years in prison for rape
news.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the eldest son of Norway’s Crown Princess Mette-Marit, was sentenced to four years in prison Monday after being convicted of rape. He was found guilty of two of the four rape charges he was facing and acquitted of the other two.
